faction.name: Xeladron
faction.lore: Sealed away with the fabric of time itself, he returns with greater destruction than any glacier of destruction.

spell.name: Decay
spell.effect: Split Xeladron into 1 Emissary and 1 Portal Bearer. Place 1 Emissary from Reserve diagonal to Portal Bearer on unoccupied field in own zone, then Xeladron back to Reserve.

passives.name: Impact
passives.effect: Use 6: Put Xeladron and all surrounding creatures into Exile. Gain 1 Field Bonus VP for every opposing creature put into Exile.

passives.name: Forceful Alliance
passives.effect: Gain 1 virtual VP for each pair of Xeladron + Portal in your possession.

creatures.name: Enchantress of Gravity
creatures.movement: Force of Attraction: During movement/attack on diagonal to 1+ opposing creatures, move 1 of them 1 field diagonal adjacent to her.
creatures.attack: Force of Attraction: During movement/attack on diagonal to 1+ opposing creatures, move 1 of them 1 field diagonal adjacent to her.

spell.name: Energy Circle
spell.effect: Beginning of turn, if control ≥1 Portal, 1 Portal Bearer, 1 Emissary: Lose control of 1 if Emissary leaves game and no other under control.

passives.name: Dimensional Summoning
passives.effect: Put 1 creature from Exile. Then use any number of Power Level to Portal Bearer on board. Place it adjacent to friendly Portal Bearer on board.

spell.name: New Paths
spell.effect: Split a Portal Guardian into 1 Bearer and 1 Portal. Place 1 Portal Bearer and 1 from Reserve diagonal to each other and adjacent to Portal Guardian. Portal Guardian back to Reserve.

creatures.name: Portal Bearer
creatures.movement: Aerial Maneuver: Can move over adjacent creature to unoccupied field. Don't move Portal Bearer back to field started from.

passives.name: Arrival
passives.effect: Gain 1 Trigger if Portal Bearer placed into game.

passives.name: Balance
passives.effect: If this on any unoccupied field, place 1 Portal from your Reserve or upgrade friendly Portal by 1 Power Level.

creatures.name: Portal
creatures.movement: Unmovable: Portals can't use movement actions.

passives.name: As long as you control 1 Portal Bearer
passives.effect: You can move friendly creatures through it to field with Portal. Friendly Bearer performs with Portal Bearer back to Reserve and downgrade Portal Bearer by 1 Power Level.

passives.name: Resistance
passives.effect: Immune against attacks if you control Portals ≤ friendly Portal Bearers in game.
